# SaaS Trial Activation System

For SaaS, the ad does not sell the product. The ad sells entry into a proof sequence.

```text
ad → landing page → demo/proof → signup → first-value event → repeated value → paid conversion
```

## First-value event examples

- imported first file,
- generated first report,
- connected first integration,
- created first automation,
- invited first teammate,
- resolved first ticket,
- exported first result.

Optimize for first-value event, not just signups.
